title: trichophorum cespitosum subsp. austriacum
intro: Trichophorum cespitosum subsp. austriacum, commonly known as Austrian rush or Austriacum rush, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the sedge family. It is native to Europe and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Trichophorum cespitosum subsp. austriacum include its ability to reduce inflammation, treat skin conditions, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems.
